title: Split Site Manager Takeover
concept: A support-engineer-focused Playground workspace that makes Site Manager the primary surface, keeps creation and saved management in a left navigation model, and compresses the active WordPress site into a narrow verification preview.
focus: Site Manager as the first viewport
left navigation plus full-height operational content
dense support workflow for reproducing bugs
blue, green, and amber operational states
flows: start from Gutenberg PR or branch
featureCoverage: destructive reset and saved reload messaging
file browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editor
Blueprint editor with copy link, download bundle, and run controls
